emails.subject: FW: MID C Question
emails.body: FW: MID C Question I purchase Snohomish Transmission to deliver power from MID C to Montana sys. The Transmission cost is $2.00 per mw. This cost is added in addition to the power price at MID C. The Air Products deal is at MID C. We fill this position by purchasing at MID C. I hope this helps. Lisa

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: already have it...........what kind of trouble are you getting into today?????

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: NUT AND HONEY....just being retarded again...sorry, didn't see your name on the last e-mail...so do you have any dirt to share with me? What's up with the exec at EPME? lisa

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: sad story, huh. no dirt here, just clean living........... later

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: do you have the scoop him? lisa

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: nothing more than what the rags say...........when you traveling? you need a trip...........

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: i'm going to las vegas in august for a couple of days with my sisters and mom...what do you think?....how about you? when and where was your last trip for pleasure? lisa

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: RE: MID C Question My last fun trip was to portland. Going to see the folks for july 4. DS Doug Sewell

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: dude, serious? Portland...portland is sooooooooo lame....i can't help it if my parents decided to come off the boat here instead of some place in southern CA...no i can't move back because i need family support...help me plan my next huge vacation...before law school....not too expensive but fun and relaxing...have any ideas? lg To: Gang, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: MID C Question
emails.body: RE: MID C Question I'll work on it. Vegas works, as a start...... Doug Sewell
